references.text: Nghia Son, H, B Dinh Thach, N Tran Nhan Tam & D Van Son. 2020. A new species of Helicteres (Malvaceae) from southern Vietnam. Taiwania 65: 321-325.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 28 June 2025

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 963 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 51.
species.distribution: Cambodia, China, Laos, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. BUSUANGA, CULION, LUZON: Abra, Benguet, Cagayan, Ilocos Norte, Ilocos Sur, Isabela, Mountain Province, Nueva Ecija, Nueva Vizcaya, MARARISON (photos), MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao, Davao del Sur, NEGROS, PANAY.
species.notes: Open grassy slopes. Chiefly at medium elevation, occasionally at sea-level.

species.citation: Lour. , Fl. Cochinch. (1790) 530 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 329; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 51.
species.distribution: Andaman Isls, Bangladesh, Cambodia, China, India, Laos, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Philippines, Thailand, Vietnam. CALAMIANES, CULION, LUZON: Bataan, Benguet, Bulacan, Ilocos Norte, La Union, Laguna, NCR, Pampanga, Pangasinan, Rizal, Zambales, MINDORO, PALAWAN.
species.notes: Common in thickets, deserted clearings and secondary forests at low and medium elevation.
